script: AddText"Entering the station after docking you can see a large embelem of the Nation emblazoned prominently over the main entranceway. Numerous replika units are around working the dockyard with several replikas roaming around with weaponry. Obviously this is a major security zone as most of the patrolling replikas are armed with shotguns, rifles and shields. A stern looking replika security officer steps towards you and to demand that you sign several forms, shoving a rather beaten looking computer pad in your face. After what seems like an eternity you finally sign the last of the forms just for docking. Satisfied, the replika security officer then waves you past the security checkpoint, allowing you to finally begin your errands and buisness at the station" textGrayColor

AddText"Arriving at Vineta, you are immediately greeted by a large crowd of people waiting for transport to and from the planet. At the security checkpoint the security replika hands you a rather worn looking computer pad. Numerous customs and declaration forms labeled REQUIRED greet your eyes. After a very long time you finally complete the last form and hand the pad back to the replika. Satisfied she opens the security gate and waves you in. As you walk out, you can hear the replika behind you shout 'NEXT' for the next person in line." textGrayColor
AddText"The embarkation area was rather empty with a large number of workers and replikas handling large cargo containers being loaded onto trams, " textGrayColor

AddText"After a very, very long spell at the security booth trying to get the forms signed, ordered and filled out, you exit the docking area to finally enter the main lobby area. The logo of the Nation is exceptionally prominent, a massive golden icon towering over the people walking about. The brillance of color the emblem makes isn't enough to cover up the dreadful rainy gloom outside. The large number of grey apartment building certainly do not help. The sooner ship captains complete their buisness and leave Rotfront, the happier they become." textGrayColor

AddText"From orbit, the yellow clouds obscure Heimat's cities. However once you land, get past the port authority replikas and sign the insane forms, visitors are greeted by a large, almost opulent city. Numerous people walk about with an equal number of replikas of varying shapes and heights doing various tasks. For you and your fellow crewmates, Heimat is probably one of the few places that actually look like people care about appearences." textGrayColor

AddText"Cargo ships, frieght trams and workers are a common sight, even at the passenger areas. It seems that despite being a general port, its mostly used for shipping cargo out. Security replikas are much rougher and strict here as the number greeting you dont have the usual security weaponry but much heavier stuff. You can definitly detect an air of fear here. Most of the workers avoid your gaze while the replikas seem to be occupying positions of authority here." textGrayColor
